[ObsoleteAttribute]
public static Task<IServerSession> GetServerSessionAsync(
	this IServerSessionService service,
	IRequest request,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IServerSessionService. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
